title: Citrusy Mexican Orange Flatbread
description: A tender and citrusy flatbread dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, perfect for breakfast or a light meal, crafted to be whole30-friendly.
instructions: Mix the coconut oil, water, orange zest, orange juice, and sea salt in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add whole wheat flour to the mixture while continuously mixing until you have a dough that is not sticky but still easy to shape. Knead for about 3 minutes.
Turn out onto a floured surface and knead gently once more to incorporate any flour from your hands. Divide into small balls (about the size of golf balls).
Press each ball slightly with your fingers to flatten it into round discs, then place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and crisp.
Serve hot as an accompaniment to breakfast or as a light snack.
